member.name: T:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLogger
member.summary: Custom logger implementation that integrates with the KalshiBot logging infrastructure. This logger provides comprehensive logging functionality by: - Formatting log messages and outputting them to the console for immediate developer visibility (configurable verbosity) - Enqueuing log entries for asynchronous database storage via the DatabaseLoggingQueue with batching support - Forwarding warnings and errors to the error handler for centralized error management - Supporting dynamic configuration for environment-specific settings including min log levels - Maintaining structured logging with consistent metadata across all log entries - Providing metrics and monitoring for queue depth and processing performance

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLogger.#ctor(System.String,KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,BacklashDTOs.Configuration.LoggingConfig,BacklashDTOs.Configuration.ExecutionConfig,BacklashBot.Management.Interfaces.IBrainStatusService,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DatabaseLogger class with the specified parameters.
member.param: The category name for this logger instance, typically the fully qualified name of the logging class.
The queue responsible for handling database logging operations asynchronously.
The minimum log level that this logger will process; logs below this level are ignored.
Optional logging configuration for dynamic environment settings including min log levels.
Optional execution configuration for brain instance settings.
Optional brain status service for session identifier retrieval.
Default environment name if not specified in config.
Default instance name if not specified in config.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLogger.BeginScope``1(``0)
member.summary: Begins a logical operation scope. This implementation returns null as scoped logging is not supported.
member.typeparam: The type of the state object associated with the scope.
member.param: The state object for the scope.
member.returns: A disposable object that ends the scope, or null if not supported.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLogger.IsEnabled(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel)
member.summary: Determines whether logging is enabled for the specified log level.
member.param: The log level to check.
member.returns: True if logging is enabled for the level; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLogger.Log``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,``0,System.Exception,System.Func{``0,System.Exception,System.String})
member.summary: Logs a message with the specified log level, event ID, state, and optional exception. The message is formatted, logged to console if above min console level, enqueued asynchronously for database storage if appropriate, and forwarded to the error handler for centralized error management.
member.typeparam: The type of the state object.
member.param: The severity level of the log message.
The event ID associated with the log message.
The state object containing additional information.
The exception associated with the log message, if any.
A function to format the state and exception into a string message.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLogger.GetSessionIdentifier
member.summary: Retrieves the current session identifier from the brain status service. Returns "DEF" as a fallback if the service is unavailable or the identifier cannot be retrieved.
member.returns: The session identifier string, or "DEF" if unavailable.

member.name: T:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue
member.summary: Background service that asynchronously processes log entries from a concurrent queue and persists them to the database with batching support for improved performance. Also manages error handler queues for warnings and errors. Supports both regular application logging and overseer-specific logging contexts. Provides metrics and monitoring for queue depth and processing performance.

member.name: P:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.Warnings
member.summary: Queue for warning-level log entries that need to be processed by the error handler.

member.name: P:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.Errors
member.summary: Queue for error and critical-level log entries that need to be processed by the error handler.

member.name: P:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.QueueDepth
member.summary: Gets the current depth of the database log queue for monitoring purposes.

member.name: P:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.TotalProcessedLogs
member.summary: Gets the total number of logs processed since startup.

member.name: P:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.AverageProcessingTimeMs
member.summary: Gets the average processing time per log entry in milliseconds.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DatabaseLoggingQueue.
member.param: The service provider for dependency injection.
Indicates whether this queue is for overseer-specific logging.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.EnqueueDBLogsAsync(BacklashDTOs.Data.LogEntryDTO)
member.summary: Enqueues a log entry for asynchronous database storage with batching support.
member.param: The log entry to be stored in the database.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous enqueue operation.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.EnqueueErrorHandlerLogs(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,System.Exception,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Enqueues log entries for processing by the error handler based on severity level. Warnings are queued separately from errors for different processing priorities.
member.param: The formatted log message.
The source category of the log entry.
The severity level of the log entry.
The original exception if available.
The timestamp of the log entry, defaults to current time.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the background processing loop for database logging with batching support. Continuously processes log entries from the queue in batches and saves them to the database for improved performance. Tracks processing metrics including queue depth and processing times.
member.param: Cancellation token to stop the background processing.
member.returns: A task representing the background operation.

member.name: M:KalshiBotLogging.DatabaseLoggingQueue.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the background service and logs the startup event.
member.param: Cancellation token for the startup operation.
member.returns: A task representing the startup operation.
